params.name: Armstrong's Footprint
params.source: Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%), Expert Scrolls (0.95%)
params.description:
On May 16, 1969, astronaut Footstrong completed the final preparations for the moon landing. Thanks to Project Apollo, Armstrong became the first person to walk on the moon. He said, "That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind." 15 minutes later, Aldrin also set foot on the moon, becoming the second human to walk on the moon. [Humans who walked on the moon] Apollo 11: Armstrong, Collins, etc.
Apollo 12: Conrad, Gordon, Bean.
Apollo 13: Lovell, Haise, Swigert.
Apollo …
